compiled_state.title: [worktree dispatch]: audit scripts writing state for missing WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR propagation (ref: 21d7-b84a)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
Bug 21d7-b84a revealed that review-complexity-classifier.sh was writing classifier-telemetry.jsonl to the orchestrator's artifacts dir (instead of the worktree's) because its dispatch prompts did not propagate WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR. This caused record-review.sh to fail-open on tier verification.

## Scope
Audit all scripts invoked from single-agent-integrate.md and per-worktree-review-commit.md that call get_artifacts_dir() or write to an artifacts-dir-derived path. Verify each dispatch prefixes the invocation with `WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR=$WORKTREE_ARTIFACTS` (or equivalent) so the write lands in the worktree's artifacts dir, where downstream consumers expect it.

## Known state (post 21d7-b84a fix)
- review-complexity-classifier.sh: FIXED (propagation added to both dispatch prompts)
- write-reviewer-findings.sh: OK (reviewer sub-agent exports env var per its dispatch prompt)
- record-review.sh: reads from get_artifacts_dir() — fine if called from worktree-context Bash
- record-test-status.sh: called from worktree context — fine
- capture-review-diff.sh: writes to absolute paths passed as args — fine

## What to check
Grep for `get_artifacts_dir` calls in plugins/dso/scripts/ and plugins/dso/hooks/. For each, trace its invocation sites. Any invocation from a single-agent-integrate.md or per-worktree-review-commit.md context that does not set WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR is a latent bug of the same class as 21d7-b84a.

## Fix direction
Either: (a) pass WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR to each identified invocation, or (b) wrap the orchestrator-run steps in a function that sets the env var once.

comments.body: Investigation (INTERMEDIATE, opus): Primary gap — REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md dispatches sampling/refactor-anomaly reviewers that call write-reviewer-findings.sh but has zero WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR propagation. Under worktree isolation + HUGE-tier routing, findings land in orchestrator artifacts while classifier telemetry lands in worktree — same failure shape as 21d7-b84a. Secondary gap — emit-commit-workflow-event.sh silently no-ops when WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR unset. ESCALATE: primary fix is LLM-behavioral prompt edit to REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md; requires user approval.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: USER_APPROVAL (2026-04-20): Approved for LLM-behavioral fix — edit plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md to add WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR propagation to all write-reviewer-findings.sh dispatches. Port 21d7-b84a fix pattern. Secondary: harden emit-commit-workflow-event.sh to error when unset.
comments.author: Test
